info.title: TomoToolNX
info.author: miiazertyy
info.details: Browse, preview, import and export textures either through a web browser on any device on the same network, or directly on the console. Automatically backs up your save before making any changes.

changelog:
thumb files not listed anymore for ugcs
added a savefile backup feature and prompt
logs now goes to "TomoToolNX" folder instead of "tomodachi-ugc"
made the ui cleaner (yes I used Claude I hate doing UIs)
added ability to choose either webui or directly on switch
fixed certain pixels going invisible with certain color scheme
qol features
